recap: Folarin Balogun scored his third goal of the tournament in the 45th minute to give the United States a 1-0 halftime lead over Bosnia-Herzegovina, but the Americans were forced to defend with 10 men after his red card in the 64th minute for a foul on Tarik Muharemovic. Malik Tillman sealed the 2-0 victory with a free kick goal in the 82nd minute that deflected off goalkeeper Nikola Vasilj's hand, sending the U.S. to face Belgium in the round of 16 and snapping a 10-game winless streak against European teams.
